title: coptis occidentalis
intro: Coptis occidentalis, also known as Western goldenseal, is a perennial plant native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It is a member of the Berberidaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Coptis occidentalis include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against various pathogens. Coptis occidentalis can be prepared as a root extract, tea, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
